legend.automated: Verified in the authoring DOM by an it() block.
legend.deferred: Documented as it.skip() — requires login/activity bootstrap, math-editor render, the floating formatting toolbar, Preview/Reader/Publish, persistence-after-reload, cross-browser, or char-limit flows.
